class UserName(str):
    def __new__(cls, value):
        if len(value) > 50:
            raise ValueError("Name too long")
        return super().__new__(cls, value)

class UserDTO(BaseModel):
    name: str # No validation here

class User:
    def __init__(self, name: UserName):
        # Correct: validation logic is centralized in a value object or domain model
        self.name = name
